subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, the One and only, and blessings upon Him after Whom there shall be no Prophet! O thou who drinkest the choice wine of utterance, upon thee be salutations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله وحده و الصلوه علی من لا نبی بعده یا ایها الشارب رحیق البیان علیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
